posts.text: Props to @CoachVic_UT and @TexasWBB. I know I still owe y’all a visit, but I didn’t miss that impressive win over South Carolina and the great Dawn Staley. Y’all played like a championship squad, especially Madison Booker. You’ve likely locked up a No.1 seed. Now, it’s tournament time. Can’t wait to see what y’all will do. It’s that time!

posts.text: Well, excuse me @CoachCoriClose I see you! 25 straight wins at UCLA, Big Ten Title, and Coach of the Year. @UCLAWBB Told ya I’d be watching. Thanks again for the first-class hospitality a few weeks ago. Now it’s March Madness time. More success ahead, no doubt. Might see me there too. #Congrats
